case_title: SILVA, FRANCISCO JAVIER FIGUEROA VS CALZADA, CHERYL KIM

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, CHERYL KIM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, CHERYL KIM DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE WITH LICENSE PLATE #3ABZ997 AND IS THEREFORE PRECLUDED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, FRANCISCO JAVIER FIGUEROA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALZADA, CHERYL KIM $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,022.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2006, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, CHERYL KIM
MOREC FILED BY PLTFF;MAILED COPY TO OTHER PARTY;TO FOLDER,TO SUP.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, CHERYL KIM HEARING SET FOR JAN-09-2006 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
